title: Implement EffectiveBlockers and IsEffectivelyBlocked
description: Core primitive in internal/graph/. EffectiveBlockers walks the parent chain to collect direct (issue's own unclosed DepTypeBlocks deps) and inherited (ancestor's unclosed DepTypeBlocks deps) blockers. IsEffectivelyBlocked is a convenience wrapper returning bool. Takes cascade bool param (not config import). Includes ancestor cache for batch usage. Resilient error handling: log warnings on Get failures, return partial results. See GRAPH_AND_CASCADE_DESIGN.md 'Core Primitive' and 'Error Handling Policy' sections. Include comprehensive unit tests.
close_reason: Implemented EffectiveBlockers, IsEffectivelyBlocked, EffectiveBlockersBatch, FindReadyStepsWithCascade with 12 tests
